headline: Franklin Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What You Should Know
summary: BEN's Q2 results, scheduled for April 28, are likely to show higher earnings and revenues, though net outflows and weaker equity markets may weigh on earnings.

headline: Blue Owl Capital Inc. (OWL) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Blue Owl Capital (OWL) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
